mapper.select:
select borrow.*, user.name as userName, book.name as bookName from `borrow` left join `user` on borrow.user_id = user.id left join `book` on borrow.book_id = book.id
and book.name like concat('%', #{bookName}, '%')
order by borrow.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into `borrow`(id, user_id, book_id, time, status) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{bookId}, #{time}, #{status})
mapper.update: update `borrow` set user_id = #{userId}, book_id = #{bookId}, time = #{time}, status = #{status} where id = #{id}
